operation.name: InsertOrUpdate
operation.sql: INSERT INTO message_read_outbox (user_id, peer_type, peer_id, read_user_id, read_outbox_max_id, read_outbox_max_date) VALUES (:user_id, :peer_type, :peer_id, :read_user_id, :read_outbox_max_id, :read_outbox_max_date) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_outbox_max_date = VALUES(read_outbox_max_date)

operation.name: SelectFirstReadDate
operation.sql: SELECT id, user_id, peer_type, peer_id, read_user_id, read_outbox_max_id, read_outbox_max_date FROM message_read_outbox WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id AND read_user_id = :read_user_id AND read_outbox_max_id >= :read_outbox_min_id ORDER BY read_outbox_max_id LIMIT :limit
